GitHub Copilot vs Cursor (2026): Which Should You Use?

GitHub Copilot and Cursor are both popular tools in the AI Coding Assistants space. Here's how they compare.

GitHub CopilotCursor
MakerGitHub (Microsoft)Anysphere
PricingFree tier for individuals; paid plans from $10/moFree (Hobby) tier available; Pro from $20/mo
Free tierYesYes
Best forDevelopers wanting inline autocomplete directly in their IDE.Developers building full projects with heavy AI assistance.

GitHub Copilot

AI pair programmer that autocompletes and explains code inside your editor.

An AI-first code editor built around chat, autocomplete, and codebase-aware edits.
